meta.strategy: Group tools into categories, show category cards that expand to reveal individual tools
page_design: Lead with differentiators in a hero/banner section — not buried in the grid
Category grouping with collapsible accordions or filter tabs
Progress bar: "15 available · 52 coming soon · 46 planned"
Visual distinction between available (filled), coming-soon (outlined), planned (ghosted) cards
Each differentiator card should be visually distinct (accent border, badge, larger)
